The '''Jango Fett Arena''' was a combat stadium located in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. Named in honor of the famed [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], it included a private box for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. The stadium featured battles between large, carnivorous beasts, such as [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]] or [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragons]].<ref name="ITW" />
